mapper.select: SELECT p.payment_id AS paymentId, p.order_id AS orderId, o.user_id AS userId, p.payment_amount AS paymentAmount, p.payment_method AS paymentMethod, p.payment_status AS paymentStatus, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS paymentDate FROM payments p INNER JOIN orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.payment_id DESC

SELECT p.payment_id AS paymentId, p.order_id AS orderId, o.user_id AS userId, p.payment_amount AS paymentAmount, p.payment_method AS paymentMethod, p.payment_status AS paymentStatus, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS paymentDate FROM payments p INNER JOIN orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id WHERE p.payment_id = #{paymentId} AND o.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( order_id, payment_amount, payment_method, payment_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, 'PAID', NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE payments p INNER JOIN orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id SET p.payment_status = 'CANCELLED', p.updated_at = NOW() WHERE p.payment_id = #{paymentId} AND o.user_id = #{userId} AND p.payment_status != 'CANCELLED'
